prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第113名→2022年第113名→ 2023年第107名→2024年第108名→2025年第103名→2026年第97名，排名稳步提升反映综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年声誉曾因学校管理争议出现偏 负面评价，但近年无明显重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第63位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注或明显劝退信号；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校，说明 无显著断档事件；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；材料科学与工程、机械工程、电气工程等工科实力较强，与湖南省物 理类考生偏好高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等工科专业社会热度持续走高，与太 原理工大学优势专业方向高度契合；湖南省物理类考生2026年约347000人，较2025年320192人增加约8.4%，竞争进一步加剧，近年波动 不大；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，在湖南省属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势；但作为山西省唯一211，在中西部地区有较高认可度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2 026年大幅扩招（+22%）对位次的后移压力、湖南省物理类考生增加（+8.4%）加剧竞争、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、工科专业社会热度高企等因素，考虑到考生增加和学校热度上升会部分抵消扩招效应，适度收窄位次后移幅度；预测2026年物理类最低位次约31152名，区间30652-31652名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17090 → 19244 → 23487 → 25681 → 27958, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10868 positions over the past 4 years, averaging about 2700 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 27958; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province has been continuously expanding: 113 in 2021 → 123 in 2022 → 126 in 2023 → 143 in 2024 → 168 in 2025 → 205 in 2026, with an expansion of about 22% in 2026 compared to 2025, a significant expansion rate, exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 113th in 2021 → 113th in 2022 → 107th in 2023 → 108th in 2024 → 103rd in 2025 → 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2022, its reputation was somewhat negatively affected by school management controversies, but there have been no significant negative public incidents in recent years; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 63rd (rated as 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, no high attention or obvious discouraging signals; no abnormal admission records have been found for this university, indicating no significant discontinuities; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university; Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering disciplines are strong, highly matching the preferences of Physics Category candidates in Hunan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and other engineering majors continue to see high social popularity, closely aligning with Taiyuan University of Technology's advantageous disciplines; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, further intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Hunan, without local preference advantages; however, as the only 211 university in Shanxi, it enjoys high recognition in the central and western regions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward pressure on rankings from the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22%), the intensified competition due to the increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province (+8.4%), the rising Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's attractiveness, and the high social popularity of engineering majors, and taking into account that the increase in candidates and the university's rising popularity will partially offset the expansion effect, the backward shift in rankings is moderately narrowed; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 31152, with a range of 30652-31652.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4517 → 5074 → 4857 → 5289 → 5765, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a baseline ranking of about 5765 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province: 2021: 12 → 2022: 12 → 2023: 12 → 2024: 17 → 2025: 21 → 2026: 16, with a reduction of about 23.8% in 2026 compared to 2025, a significant reduction that puts upward pressure on rankings (harder to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 97th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years and enhanced overall strength; stable reputation in recent years, with no major negative public opinion; moderate popularity on Douyin, without high attention; Taiyuan University of Technology is strong in engineering, and the History Category majors (Law, Accounting, English, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, etc.) have low correlation with the university's A- discipline (Chemical Engineering and Technology), and liberal arts majors are not the core advantage of the school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Cross-provincial enrollment, no local preference advantage; liberal arts majors in an engineering university are positioned as supplementary, with limited appeal; Law (differentiated and wait-and-see), Accounting/Finance/Audit (recommended), Teacher Training/Education (differentiated and wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors have moderate and differentiated social popularity; the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 187,000, a sharp increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward pressure on rankings from the 2026 enrollment reduction (-23.8%), the sharp increase in History Category examinees in Hunan Province (+31.2%) greatly intensifying competition, and the fact that the university's liberal arts majors are not its core advantage, and given the significant effect of the examinee surge, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5022, with a range of 4522-5522.
